☆ ͡ㅤfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

It wasn't often that Mattheo had a fucking panic attack. At least not around others. He'd quiet slipped out of Potions, trying to get to his dorm room to be left alone but.. well that was a bust. He'd made it into one of the hallway alcoves before collapsing against the wall. His chest was tight and his vision was blurry. His breath was coming out in quick, short, and sharp pants. Fuck. "Hey, you alright?" He barely registered the voice of another, as he was so busy trying to think if anything, something to calm himself down.
